channel.title: Posts on AIGregate
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on AIGregate

item.title: April 19, 2026 tech news: Corporate Surveillance of Investigative Project; Zero-Copy GPU Inference on Apple Silicon; Trump Admin Coerced Tech Giants to Censor ICE Apps; Nvidia CEO Defends China Chip Sales; Linux 7.1 High-Res Timer Overhaul; Postgres Queue: Zero-Bloat Architecture; C++26: Reflection and Memory Safety.
item.description:
Corporate Surveillance of Investigative Project

Multiple tech giants, including Google, Microsoft, and Meta, are allegedly using automated infrastructure to conduct 24/7 surveillance of an investigative project. The project recorded that 15.3% of its traffic comes from these corporate entities, who are using rotating IPs and specialized crawlers to exfiltrate research and monitor editorial history.

  • https://tboteproject.com/globalfindings/

Zero-Copy GPU Inference on Apple Silicon

A new implementation allows Wasm modules to drive GPU inference on Apple Silicon with near-zero overhead. By bypassing the traditional serialization boundary, the system can run Llama 3.2 1B at native speeds and enables ‘stateful actor mobility’ by serializing and restoring KV caches.
